name: Golden Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the fruits, nuts, and lemon rind with half of the sifted flour.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
4. Gradually combine the remaining sifted flour, salt, and baking powder (sift together three times).
5. Add this mixture to the creamed mixture.
6. Mix in the fruit and nut combination well.
7. Pour the batter into greased loaf pans lined with greased brown paper.
8. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Makes 4 loaves (7 x 3 x 2 1/2 inches).
